name: lisa
description: Knowledge graph memory system using Neo4j for entity relationships and graph-based retrieval.
approachDetail: Full Neo4j graph database with entity relationships
crossMachineDetail: Possible if Neo4j is hosted on a server, but not the default setup
contextInjectionDetail: Agent queries Neo4j graph via CLI commands to retrieve entity relationships
networkDetail: Requires Neo4j which can run locally or on a remote server
auditTrailDetail: Temporal tracking on entities but not full event sourcing
